originalTitle: 'They told me he was dead': Children born near Kenyan army base learn truth about UK soldier dads
title: 'They told me he was dead': Children born near Kenyan army base learn truth about UK soldier dads
content: A DNA and legal project has identified the fathers of 20 children born near a military base in Kenya.

originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
content: The country's biggest musician Teddy Afro laments a lack of unity in the country on his new track.

originalTitle: Eight runners hospitalised after collapsing during South Korea marathon
title: Eight runners hospitalised after collapsing during South Korea marathon
content: Heat-related illnesses cause 12 runners to fall during the race near South Korea's Demilitarized Zone.

originalTitle: Baby food recalled in Austria after jar tests positive for rat poison
title: Baby food recalled in Austria after jar tests positive for rat poison
content: Baby food brand HiPP recalls products after Austrian police say a tampered jar contained rodent poison.

originalTitle: Magnitude 7.5 earthquake strikes northern Japan; tsunami warning issued
title: Magnitude 7.5 earthquake strikes northern Japan; tsunami warning issued
content: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi says the government has set up a crisis management team following the strong earthquake.

originalTitle: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
content: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

originalTitle: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
content: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
content: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

originalTitle: 'By chance or choice, they have clicked' - why Man City will be champions
title: 'By chance or choice, they have clicked' - why Man City will be champions
content: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why he thinks Manchester City will beat Arsenal to the Premier League title.

title: Dream derby result for Liverpool fans but huge summer ahead for Slot
content: Liverpool's 100th-minute winner at Everton moves the Reds closer to a Champions League spot - but issues still remain.

originalTitle: Record-breaking Bayern win Bundesliga - now for the Treble
title: Record-breaking Bayern win Bundesliga - now for the Treble
content: Free-scoring Bayern Munich swept to the German title for the 35th time. Now their sights turn towards completing the Treble.
